# Daily Digest

*Auto-generated by nightly consolidation. Last updated: 2026-02-13T03:00:00Z*

## Date

2026-02-13

## Summary

A landmark day for Lobster: the sync epic (#30) was completed with all 5 layers merged to main. This is the largest single feature effort in Lobster's history -- 6,437 lines across 5 PRs with 153 tests. The Transformers energy flow epic (#10) was also completed earlier. Drew also created the first bisque-cli brain dump (#1) exploring AI-native domain registrar concepts.

## Key Events

### Lobster Sync Epic (#30) -- COMPLETED
All 5 layers merged to main:
- **Layer 1** (PR #40): lobster-sync core script -- zero-disruption git plumbing using `write-tree`/`commit-tree` to back up working trees without touching index or working directory
- **Layer 2** (PR #41): Nightly consolidation pipeline and canonical memory files -- the system generating this very digest
- **Layer 3** (PR #43): Bridge convenience tools (`lobster_bridge_local.py`) -- higher-level MCP tools (`get_priorities`, `get_project_context`, `get_daily_digest`, `list_projects`) reading from canonical files
- **Layer 4** (PR #44): macOS integration -- launchd plist, CLI wrapper (`lobster-sync`), installer/uninstaller scripts, Keychain integration
- **Layer 5** (PR #45): VPS-side integration -- sync awareness, canonical push script (`push-canonical.sh`)

### Transformers Energy Flow Epic (#10) -- COMPLETED
All 7 layers merged. Drew's vision: a physically faithful electron path visualization -- Power Plants (specific generators) to Substations (transmission/distribution interconnection points) to Projects (datacenter facilities). Energy Flow Sankey diagram.

### bisque-cli Brain Dump (#1)
Research into AI-native domain registrar concepts.
